examples: The differential diagnoses include myelophthisis and aplastic anemia.
Clinical feature of acute aplastic anemia is fever, infection and bleeding.
Objective: To explore more effective regimen for chronic aplastic anemia (CAA).
Many horses have received Bute, which is a carcinogen and can cause aplastic anemia in humans.
In long-term use it carries a one in 30, 000 risk of a serious side effect - the bone marrow disorder aplastic anaemia.
